title: oenothera claviformis subsp. aurantiaca
intro: Oenothera claviformis subsp. aurantiaca, also known as the California evening primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high levels of flavonoids and terpenoids. The medicinal properties of Oenothera claviformis subsp. aurantiaca have been shown to have various health benefits, including the reduction of inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as the improvement of cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
